title: Mavoothu Vellappar Temple
tagline: Mavoothu Vellappar Temple — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Mavoothu Vellappar Temple is a Hindu temple located in the town of Mavoothu in the Theni District of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Mavoothu Vellappar Temple is a Hindu temple located in the town of Mavoothu in the Theni District of Tamil Nadu, India. The temple was constructed by the Kandamanur zamindar. The spring within the temple is believed to have curative powers.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mavoothu Vellappar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mavoothu Vellappar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mavoothu Vellappar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Madurai Airport (54 km) and the nearest railway station is Madurai Junction (58 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mavoothu Vellappar Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mavoothu Vellappar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mavoothu Vellappar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Mavoothu Vellappar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
